title: Model, Surface, Capability, and Constraint Selection · Spiral Review
summary: Choose between Claude and Codex surfaces for a repository and document task. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a capability and surface decision matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose chat, coding-agent, API, or workflow surfaces according to state, tools, latency, and review needs.
Verify current model and tool capabilities from official documentation rather than remembered names.
Match reasoning effort and autonomy to task complexity, reversibility, and verification cost.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.prompt:
# Cross-agent prompt portfolio
# Add tested contracts below. Keep shared intent separate from Claude and Codex adaptations.

content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Surface Fit condition decided your prediction.

steps.title: Retrieve the complete evidence cycle

steps.title: Separate evidence from confidence

review case — Use a changed review case for prompt model surface that tests this competency: Separate stable task contracts from provider-specific syntax and capability assumptions.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Inspect the Provider Portability trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

stimulus.title: Provider Portability case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case for prompt model surface that tests this competency: Separate stable task contracts from provider-specific syntax and capability assumptions.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: One provider prompt should be copied unchanged everywhere.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Separate stable task contracts from provider-specific syntax and capability assumptions. Artifact under review: a capability and surface decision matrix.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, apply Provider Portability without its stated preconditions, omit the a capability and surface decision matrix trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Provider Portability for a capability and surface decision matrix.
The record names the assumption, applies Provider Portability, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Provider Portability record says a capability and surface decision matrix looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. This does not resolve separate evidence from confidence.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write the review evidence note for Provider Portability: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed review case for prompt model surface that tests this competency: Separate stable task contracts from provider-specific syntax and capability assumptions.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Provider Portability through the concrete a capability and surface decision matrix case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Separate stable task contracts from provider-specific syntax and capability assumptions.
